query: hi I need help with my order
resolved_output: I'd be happy to help you with your order. You can track the status of your order by logging in to your account and checking the 'Orders' section. If you need to return an item, you can do so by going to Order History and clicking 'Return Item', or I can connect you with a human agent for further assistance.

I'm happy to help, but since the knowledge base doesn't have technical support information, I'd be happy to connect you with a human agent who can assist you further. Please note that they are available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST.
